display.name: API Gateway Overview (Multi-API)
display.description: Overview of API Gateway resources in a region, supporting REST, HTTP, and WebSocket APIs.

display.name: Account
display.description: AWS Account

spec.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cloud.account.id') as `cloud.account.id`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE 
 metric_name like '%aws_ApiGateway%'
GROUP BY `cloud.account.id`

display.name: Region
display.description: AWS Region

spec.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cloud.region') as `cloud.region`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE 
 metric_name like '%aws_ApiGateway%'
 and JSONExtractString(labels, 'cloud.account.id') IN {{.Account}}
GROUP BY `cloud.region`

display.name: Integration Latency
display.description: The time between when API Gateway relays a request to the backend and when it receives a response from the backend. This metric applies to both HTTP and WebSocket APIs.

filter.expression: (ApiId EXISTS AND cloud.account.id = $Account AND cloud.region = $Region AND Stage EXISTS)

display.name: 4XX Errors
display.description: The number of client-side errors (4XX errors) in a given period.

display.name: 5XX Errors
display.description: The number of server-side errors (5XX errors) in a given period.

display.name: Requests
display.description: The total number of HTTP API requests in a given period.

display.name: Data Processed
display.description: The amount of data processed in bytes for HTTP API requests.

display.name: Latency
display.description: The total time between when API Gateway receives a request from a client and when it returns a response to the client.

display.name: 5XX Errors
display.description: The number of server-side errors captured in a given period.

display.name: Cache Hits
display.description:
The number of requests served from the API cache in a given period.

See CacheHitCount at https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/api-gateway-metrics-and-dimensions.html for more details

display.name: Cache Misses
display.description:
The number of requests served from the backend in a given period, when API caching is enabled.

See CacheMissCount at https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/api-gateway-metrics-and-dimensions.html for more details

display.name: Integration Latency
display.description: The time between when API Gateway relays a request to the backend and when it receives a response from the backend.

display.name: Latency
display.description: The time between when API Gateway receives a request from a client and when it returns a response to the client.

display.name: Requests
display.description: The total number API requests in a given period.

display.name: Client Errors (4XX)
display.description: The number of requests that return a 4XX response from API Gateway before the integration is invoked.

display.name: Connect Count
display.description: The number of messages sent to the $connect route integration.

display.name: Execution Errors (5XX)
display.description: Errors that occurred when calling the integration (5XX responses).

display.name: Integration Errors
display.description: The number of requests that return a 4XX/5XX response from the integration.

display.name: Message Count
display.description: The number of messages sent to your WebSocket API.
